document_metadata.purpose: Extract delay causes, train distributions, and metrics for SNCF synthetic data generation

delay_causes.title: Causes de Retard (Delay Causes) - TER 2016
delay_causes.source: AQST (Autorité de la Qualité de Service dans les Transports)
delay_causes.description: First published comprehensive analysis of TER delay causes

causes.name: Externes au transport
causes.description: External causes including weather, track obstacles, suspicious packages, malice, and social movements

causes.name: Gestion de trafic
causes.description: Traffic management issues affecting circulation on rail lines and network interactions

causes.name: Infrastructure
causes.description: Railway infrastructure issues including maintenance and works

causes.name: Gestion en gare et réutilisation de matériel
causes.description: Station management and equipment reallocation including crew and material reassignment

causes.name: Prise en compte voyageurs
causes.description: Passenger-related delays including crowd management, disabled persons, connections

regional_variation.note: Geographic variation of 3x between best and worst regions

key_insights: External causes are dominant despite being partially controllable
Best results obtained when all cause categories are simultaneously controlled
No strong correlation with traffic intensity
Regional factors appear significant in delay management

train_type_distribution.title: Train Type Distribution - 2023
train_type_distribution.source: Bilan Ferroviaire 2023 - Autorité de Régulation des Transports (ART)

distribution_by_service_type.comment: Total railway traffic in 2023: 386 million trains.km

TER.description: Regional express trains - highest frequency service type
TER.note: Most common train type for daily regional services

Transilien_and_RER.description: Île-de-France suburban commuter services and RER

TGV_and_SLO.description: High-speed domestic TGV trains and international services
TGV_and_SLO.note: Highest occupancy rates but lower frequency

Intercités.description: Included with TER for aggregate analysis
Intercités.note: Long-distance regional services, often grouped with TER data

conventioned.description: Services with public service obligations (TER, Transilien, RER, Intercités)

freely_organized.note: High-speed services with higher revenue but lower frequency

regional_distribution.metric: TER employment by region (2023) - proxy for service volume
regional_distribution.note: Can be used as weights for regionalized data generation

key_metrics_2023.social_movement_impact: March 2023 saw 8-15% decrease in monthly frequency

passenger_trains.note: Degradation for all services except international

delay_causes.adjustment: Consider slight increase for 'Externes au transport' due to climate change
delay_causes.temporal_pattern: Higher frequency during peak hours and bad weather

passenger_patterns.off_peak: Lower occupancy, more delays per train (cause: service optimization)

delay_generation.method: Use AQST cause distribution + regional variation factors
delay_generation.validation: Compare generated delay patterns to 2023 metrics if detailed data available
